name: coherence-mcp-server
description: MCP server for the Coherence Network — 22 typed tools for AI agents to browse ideas, trace value chains, link identities, record contributions, and explore the Living Codex ontology.

tools.name: coherence_list_ideas
tools.description: Browse ideas ranked by ROI and free-energy score

tools.name: coherence_get_idea
tools.description: Get full details for a single idea

tools.name: coherence_idea_progress
tools.description: Get progress for an idea: stage, tasks, CC staked

tools.name: coherence_select_idea
tools.description: Let the portfolio engine select the next highest-ROI idea

tools.name: coherence_showcase
tools.description: List validated, shipped ideas

tools.name: coherence_resonance
tools.description: Show which ideas are generating the most energy

tools.name: coherence_list_specs
tools.description: Browse registered specs with ROI metrics

tools.name: coherence_get_spec
tools.description: Get full spec detail including implementation plan

tools.name: coherence_list_lineage
tools.description: List value lineage chains

tools.name: coherence_lineage_valuation
tools.description: Get ROI valuation for a lineage chain

tools.name: coherence_list_providers
tools.description: List all 37 supported identity providers

tools.name: coherence_link_identity
tools.description: Link an external identity to a contributor

tools.name: coherence_lookup_identity
tools.description: Find which contributor owns a provider identity

tools.name: coherence_get_identities
tools.description: Get all linked identities for a contributor

tools.name: coherence_record_contribution
tools.description: Record a contribution to the network

tools.name: coherence_contributor_ledger
tools.description: Get CC balance and contribution history

tools.name: coherence_status
tools.description: Get network health: API status, nodes, idea count

tools.name: coherence_friction_report
tools.description: Get friction report — where the pipeline struggles

tools.name: coherence_list_change_requests
tools.description: List governance change requests

tools.name: coherence_list_federation_nodes
tools.description: List federated nodes and capabilities

tools.name: coherence_list_concepts
tools.description: Browse the Living Codex ontology concepts

tools.name: coherence_get_concept
tools.description: Get full details for a Living Codex concept

tools.name: coherence_link_concepts
tools.description: Create a typed relationship between two concepts
